follow_up_to: artifacts/track3-live-paired (frozen pre-fix run, spec-corrected chain scoring: society 0.8438 vs solo 0.7625; 10 wins / 4 ties / 6 losses)
cert_family_excluded_reason: cert (P3) incidents auto-execute via the low-risk PolicyAuthorization path; validation avoided adding executed incidents to the public stats. Cert scored 3/3 at 1.0 in the frozen pre-fix run.
chain_scoring_correction: Initial runner implementation scored solo evidence_chain at 0.55 (the deterministic harness constant), contradicting this dataset's scoring_method (solo: 1.0, 'not used to advantage either arm'). Rows and this summary are rescored to the spec; the correction adds +0.045 to every solo final_score. Nothing else changed.
